title: Board Game Rules
entries: The rules are simple, on each turn the player moves one of his or her pieces on the board. To win, they must {table:gm/tavern/game-board-winner} The {pick:most powerful piece|strongest maneuver} is called {table:gm/tavern/game-board-best}, and the worst is called {table:gm/tavern/game-board-worst}.

The rules are simple, on each turn the player places a piece on the board. To win, they must {table:gm/tavern/game-board-winner} The {pick:most powerful piece|strongest maneuver} is called {table:gm/tavern/game-board-best}, and the worst is called {table:gm/tavern/game-board-worst}.

The rules are simple, on each turn the player moves two or more of his or her pieces on the board. To win, they must {table:gm/tavern/game-board-winner} The {pick:most powerful piece|strongest maneuver} is called {table:gm/tavern/game-board-best}, and the worst is called {table:gm/tavern/game-board-worst}.

The rules are simple, on each turn the player places two or more pieces on the board. To win, they must {table:gm/tavern/game-board-winner} The {pick:most powerful piece|strongest maneuver} is called {table:gm/tavern/game-board-best}, and the worst is called {table:gm/tavern/game-board-worst}.

The rules are simple, on each turn the player removes one or more of his or her opponent's pieces by encircling it or flanking it. To win, they must {table:gm/tavern/game-board-winner} The {pick:most powerful piece|strongest maneuver} is called {table:gm/tavern/game-board-best}, and the worst is called {table:gm/tavern/game-board-worst}.

The rules are simple, on each turn the player halts his or her opponent's progress by encircling or flanking one or more of the opponent's pieces. To win, they must {table:gm/tavern/game-board-winner} The {pick:most powerful piece|strongest maneuver} is called {table:gm/tavern/game-board-best}, and the worst is called {table:gm/tavern/game-board-worst}.

The rules are simple, on each turn the player converts one or more of his or her opponent's pieces by encircling it or flanking it. To win, they must {table:gm/tavern/game-board-winner} The {pick:most powerful piece|strongest maneuver} is called {table:gm/tavern/game-board-best}, and the worst is called {table:gm/tavern/game-board-worst}.

The rules are simple, on each turn the player moves his or her piece closer to a destination space on the board. To win, they must {table:gm/tavern/game-board-winner} The {pick:most powerful piece|strongest maneuver} is called {table:gm/tavern/game-board-best}, and the worst is called {table:gm/tavern/game-board-worst}.
